## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/Build

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run compile-tests`
- [ ] `npm run smoke-test`
- [ ] `npm test` (if behavior changed)

## Risk Assessment

- [ ] I evaluated security impact (permissions, input handling, external tooling)
- [ ] I evaluated dependency impact (new/updated packages and licenses)

## Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed existing issues/PRs for overlap
- [ ] I kept this PR focused and avoided unrelated changes
- [ ] I updated docs for user-facing changes
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] I did not include secrets or generated artifacts

## Screenshots / Demo (if applicable)

Add before/after screenshots or a short demo for UI changes.
